generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about defense—it's about protecting our way of life. As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vulnerable we are without true independence. The recent cyberattacks on critical infrastructure prove we can't rely on others forever. It's time to invest in our own security before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
